error_signature: Workflow could not be activated. External hook 'workflow.activate' failed.
title: Workflow activation failure due to plan limits
symptom: Users encounter an error stating 'Workflow could not be activated. External hook 'workflow.activate' failed.' when trying to activate workflows beyond the allowed limit.
applies_when: Attempting to activate more than 2 workflows
not_this_if: Deactivated one of the active workflows
root_cause: The n8n Cloud Free Plan restricts users to a maximum of 2 active workflows. Attempting to activate additional workflows without upgrading the plan results in the activation failure error.
fix_steps: Upgrade to a paid plan to allow more active workflows
Deactivate one of the currently active workflows to activate a new one
agent_instruction: Upgrade your n8n plan or deactivate an existing workflow to activate a new one.
